scores.notes: Significant OCR errors throughout including misspellings (Relerenze, Reciptent, Serrtoel, Cbarge, Welght, Nomberof, Descriptionf, Additlonal, Grss Valar), garbled text in addresses and names, incorrect numeric formatting (colons instead of periods in amounts like 38:36, 30:83), and fragmented table cells. Table structure is partially preserved but many cells are misaligned or split incorrectly. Some numeric values appear accurate while others are clearly wrong or incomplete.
